current.status: STALE — last test date unknown, athlete reports 'давно'. All zone-based prescriptions until retest are PROVISIONAL.

next_lthr_run.protocol: 30-min all-out time trial on flat route. LTHR ≈ avg HR of last 20 min. Pre-test: 2 easy days. Substitutes Saturday Tempo session. See docs/THRESHOLD_TESTS.md

next_ftp_cycling.protocol: 20-min all-out on trainer (ERG off). FTP = avg power × 0.95. Substitutes Monday Cycling Z2. See docs/THRESHOLD_TESTS.md

retest_schedule.frequency: Every 8 weeks during Base/Build phases; every 6 weeks in Specific phase

history.note: Values inherited from athlete profile, no test log exists

zones_derived_from.warning: If LTHR retest shifts >5 bpm — zones must be regenerated and CLAUDE.md updated
